# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-06-23 | **更新时间**: 07:47 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[00:19]` **🏛️监管 | 美国 WorldMeds® 获得美国 FDA 全面批准 TECELRA® (afamitresgene autoleucel) 并扩大适应症，将首个获批的实体瘤工程 T 细胞疗法推广至年仅 12 岁的儿童**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *US WorldMeds® Receives Full U.S. FDA Approval of TECELRA® (afamitresgene autoleucel) with an Expanded Indication, Extending the First Approved Engineered T-Cell Therapy for a Solid Tumor to Children as Young as 12* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **美国生物医学创新领导地位面临风险：新数据显示，随着临床试验和制造业向海外转移，中国正在迅速缩小差距**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *U.S. Biomedical Innovation Leadership at Risk: New Data Show China Rapidly Closing Gap as Clinical Trials and Manufacturing Migrate Abroad* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **Leerink Partners 扩大肿瘤学研究团队，增加 Asthika Goonewardene**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Leerink Partners Expands Oncology Research Team with Addition of Asthika Goonewardene* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:30]` **Thermo Fisher Scientific 在 BIO International 2026 上展示制造、临床开发和人工智能研究的新能力**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Thermo Fisher Scientific Showcases New Capabilities Across Manufacturing, Clinical Development and AI-Enabled Research at BIO International 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:20]` **🏛️监管 | CARsgen 宣布全球首个实体瘤 CAR T 细胞治疗产品 Satri-cel 获批**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *CARsgen Announces Approval of Satri-cel, the World's First CAR T-Cell Therapy Product for Solid Tumors* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[08:00]` **第一阶段 IND 指导文件**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Phase 1 IND Guidance Documents* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxNTU9rcjJDYVpaYzFpLUpOdHJ0ZHREc1JFaEtlM2MyNUxsX0x0cW11NnBHNFVFd2p4VGZDbkxpQjZ4cGp3aHJVVFZ1Tmhwc3A5MWFqaEt6NW1wUVBMLXpOZkY4Smp4eGlFZ1Rpd3JYRC1lWV9zUXRQaFpWQXVvNlAyWWFYU2hSOVNUbEdKeGc0ZUc1U1ZBekE4TWlUckp0NE5QNE5nS0RHbFc?oc=5)</small>

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[05:08]` **CARsgen CAR-T获中国首个批准用于实体瘤**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Greenlit in China, CARsgen's CAR-T is first-ever approved for solid tumours* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiU0FVX3lxTE8wT1N3TmxkVmVoRkduWlFjTGZwMXlJSjV0Zzg5MUFjcG15M3Z6alpOeFVaLU5IUDhYUkNOcm5OS1U1SGktN3MyckI4VWlGLUhHdWNZ?oc=5)</small>
